context.audience: Web developers building mobile-first experiences without native apps, startup teams choosing between PWA and native for mobile presence, developers optimizing existing web apps for mobile devices
pain_points: Progressive Web App capabilities and limitations across iOS and Android
Offline support and service worker caching strategies for mobile users
Performance optimization for mobile devices with limited CPU and bandwidth
Push notification implementation that works across platforms
App-like navigation and gestures in mobile web applications
content_that_works: PWA vs native app comparison articles
